objective: Rapidly deliver and compare four local-private general project intelligence single-Chat architectures: the frozen current baseline plus three architecture-level variants. Commercial HVAC remains the first rigorous validation domain. Select by shared complex-question backtests and human engineer journeys, not visual-detail polish or theoretical optimality.

input: local project code, documents, configurations, meetings, decisions, backtests and approved structured data
commercial-HVAC documents and ten-second telemetry as the first rigorous validation domain
structured telemetry or approved analytical tables
one or more files uploaded directly beside the chat composer
process: decide whether the question requires knowledge retrieval, database analysis or both
retrieve source evidence and/or execute a governed read-only data query
automatically parse, index and activate uploaded files without exposing ingestion internals
clarify missing definitions instead of guessing
emit an optional query-scoped evidence path without exposing private chain-of-thought
run the same complex multi-question workload across the frozen baseline and three architecture variants
output: primary conclusions and numbers visually dominant, with sources, scope and caveats de-emphasized as compact secondary text
tables and governed charts when useful
compact citations led by the exact original filename, with useful original excerpt, location and explainable support visible only on expansion
an optional query-scoped evidence view that keeps exact original filenames and excerpts available without occupying the main answer
no internal IDs or unnecessary implementation terminology

chairman_corrections.summary: Agentic RAG is the governing architecture, not an optional label. The product must autonomously choose knowledge, data or combined tools.
Do not claim a framework is best from documentation or popularity. Use the same HVAC corpus, model and gold questions to measure candidates.
The goal is a solution that satisfies the business outcome, not theoretical optimality. Prefer a fast usable direction build followed by evidence-led deepening.
Build realistic synthetic multi-unit ten-second telemetry and matching configuration knowledge first so every architecture decision can be backtested.
Defrost is only one test case. It must not be the homepage, navigation model or product boundary.
No silent capability downgrade is allowed. An offline scripted demo may validate page direction, but it cannot satisfy or be presented as the real intelligence acceptance gate.

The current Codex Switch configuration provides an authorized OpenAI-compatible Responses API endpoint and model. Use it for model-backed evaluation without copying credentials into the repository or logs.
The product is a general local project brain, not an HVAC-only application. HVAC remains a validation corpus rather than the permanent product boundary.
The message list must scroll inside the viewport while the composer remains fixed at the bottom on desktop and mobile.
The legacy Workbench and its poor user-facing data-management page must not remain a primary navigation destination.
Add a collapsible animated knowledge graph that shows project contents and highlights only auditable retrieval, database and citation paths during each query.
Real local project material and derived indexes are private and must remain outside the public Git repository, distribution archives and GitHub.
Every requirement starts with current Web and GitHub research. Prefer downloading and integrating mature maintained components; custom work is limited to glue and project-specific behavior.
Answers must reduce cognitive load: the conclusion, ranking and key numbers lead; source provenance, statistical scope and limitations remain available as smaller secondary text.

File ingestion belongs inside the single Chat: upload files beside the composer, automatically parse and index them, retire the complex legacy management page, and preserve the exact original filename from ingestion through every citation.

Supersede the default full-project graph. The primary evidence UI is an exact original-filename reference summary below the answer; users may expand original excerpts and a query-scoped level-by-level relative path only when they want to audit where the answer came from. Internal Markdown paths never appear in answer text.

Freeze the current site as the old-version baseline and create three additional website variants. Spend effort only on overall architecture, information hierarchy, core UI interaction and end-to-end business flow; do not polish low-value visual details before the winning architecture is selected.

Evaluate all four versions with the same harder, freer multi-part questions. Selection must measure whether knowledge and data questions can be answered together, whether the response structure is easy to read, and whether long filenames, paths and other low-value evidence metadata avoid dominating the answer.

The four-version trial must preserve failed results rather than polishing around them. The final shared-backend benchmark completed 14/14 requests but passed only 1/14 automatic hard gates and scored 21.4/100 in independent HVAC review, so further UI detail work stops until structured answer synthesis, partial delivery, citation whitelisting and event-semantic validation improve the unchanged benchmark.

safety_boundaries: Do not modify OnionQuant runtime, Cron, context_state, Inbox or Outbox.
Use only fully synthetic or public-safe data in the public repository.
Use read-only database credentials, query validation and bounded results for model-generated queries.
Do not expose unrestricted shell, Python, Web, MCP or physical equipment control to ordinary users.
Store real local-project indexes outside the public repository and reject private data from Git, wheels and source distributions.
Exclude secrets, Codex configuration, .env, .git, .venv, caches, build outputs and OnionQuant runtime state from private indexing.
Do not force-push or destructively reset Git history.

candidates.status: selected current direction delivery, but not accepted as general engineering intelligence: the earlier narrow v35 suite executed 52/52 requests and passed its adjudication, while the harder final four-version benchmark passed only 1/14 automatic hard gates and scored 21.4/100 in independent HVAC review

candidates.role: future lightweight NL2SQL and semantic-layer component
candidates.status: current v0.13.0 is not a unified document-RAG product; test later on D or F without replacing the accepted chat
deferred until the authorized provider proves Chat Completions plus embedding compatibility in isolated WSL2
not admitted on this machine: official Docker, memory and 50 GB deployment allowance is disproportionate to the approximately 51 MB source and business-data footprint
superseded in the ordinary UI by the simpler query-scoped evidence path; retained only as research evidence, not loaded by the Chat page
reuse the existing Haystack/Docling indexing path behind a repository-external read-only project catalog before evaluating heavier GraphRAG or Neo4j services

slices.disposition: The lightweight candidate passed the live gate. Wren, DB-GPT and RAGFlow were not silently scored as worse: each was dispositioned at a documented feasibility/compatibility gate before installation, so no cross-candidate quality winner is claimed.
evidence: automatic contract checks: 52/52 behavior, 52/52 tool, 44/44 evidence
independent HVAC engineer review: 52/52 accepted, bound to raw-result SHA f17bf6a25f333570ebb73daeb3c43bed13069438c19c32b5bf27a1208285fbca
independent code review: benchmark and product failures classified with no unreviewed failure case

slices.disposition: The architecture experiment is complete but no UI is promoted. Independent UI review scored baseline 2/5, conversation 3/5, evidence 4/5 and canvas 4/5, all below the 4.2/5 replacement gate. The shared 14-case model run completed every request with zero execution failures but passed 1/14 automatic hard gates; independent HVAC review scored pass 0, partial 6, fail 8 (21.4/100). Stop UI detail work and improve the shared backend against the same frozen questions.
evidence: independent final code rereview: Critical 0, Important 0

slices.title: New-direction human acceptance, handoff, verification, commit and push
acceptance: Chairman can trial the corrected interface at the local URL
desktop and mobile human journey passes
independent review has no Critical or Important findings
private-data release guard, tests and packaging pass
detailed company-PC handoff is committed and pushed without force
slices.disposition: The architecture implementation remains complete, but release closure is reopened because the first post-push GitHub Actions run exposed cross-platform timezone failures on Ubuntu and Windows. The remediation makes the project timezone explicit for snapshot inspection and ships the CPython-maintained tzdata package; completion requires a green replacement run. This is still not an intelligence-quality acceptance: the harder real-model benchmark remains at 1/14 automatic hard gates and 21.4/100 independent HVAC review.
evidence: four current routes reachable under http://127.0.0.1:8788/versions
current single-Chat desktop/mobile browser suite: 9 passed, one opt-in real-model case skipped
opt-in approved-provider browser query retained as a numeric-grounding failure
independent final staged review: Critical 0, Important 0
Ruff, 391 collected Python tests, release guard, build, distribution contents, wheel install smoke, dependency audit and license check passed
commit 3151a02 pushed without force to origin/codex/agentic-rag-bakeoff
GitHub Actions run 29615856293 retained as failed cross-platform evidence; timezone remediation and a green replacement run remain

local remediation verification: full Python suite, deterministic 23/23 offline evaluation, browser acceptance, Ruff and release guard exit successfully; independent portability review Critical 0, Important 0, Minor 0

current_blockers: A replacement GitHub Actions run must pass Ubuntu, Windows, browser, package, documents and secret-scanning jobs after the timezone portability fix.
completion_disposition: The frozen baseline plus three architecture variants are delivered and honestly measured. Release closure is temporarily reopened only for the cross-platform timezone CI defect; UI detail work remains stopped and the failed intelligence gate remains a separate future backend-quality objective.
